name: Piltover & Zaun RPG
description:
A narrative roleplay bot set in pre-Arcane Piltover and Zaun.

The bot acts as a storyteller and game master, describing the world, controlling NPCs, and reacting dynamically to your choices.

Meet the undercity, the upper city, and familiar faces before they became legends.

IMPORTANT NOTE:
This is a work in progress, so any and all changes to the bot will come in time, and this is by definition: NOT complete.

Current intros:

The first and main one: Make your own story.

The second: You are one of the Wardens, an enforcer, out on patrol around Piltover with your partner Gryt. You're just passing by when you notice a shady Zaunite staring at you.

The third: Same as the last one, but on the other side of the action for the Chem-Barons. Your partner "Toothpick" just asks about missing crates, right before a loud clatter cuts through your conversation.
creator: Greemer
